mapper.select: SELECT cl.*, m.major_name, m.college_id, c.college_name FROM edu_class cl LEFT JOIN edu_major m ON cl.major_id = m.id LEFT JOIN edu_college c ON m.college_id = c.id WHERE cl.id = #{id}
SELECT * FROM edu_class WHERE major_id = #{majorId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY enrollment_year DESC, class_no ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_class ( class_name, major_id, enrollment_year, class_no, student_count, counselor, status ) VALUES ( #{className}, #{majorId}, #{enrollmentYear}, #{classNo}, #{studentCount}, #{counselor}, #{status} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE edu_class
class_name = #{className},
major_id = #{majorId},
enrollment_year = #{enrollmentYear},
class_no = #{classNo},
student_count = #{studentCount},
counselor = #{counselor},
status = #{status},
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM edu_class WHERE major_id = #{majorId}
mapper.update: UPDATE edu_class SET student_count = #{count} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM edu_class WHERE class_name = #{className} LIMIT 1
